mapper.select: SELECT E1.EMPNO, E1.ENAME, E1.JOB, E2.ENAME AS MGR_NAME, D.DNAME, S.GRADE FROM EMP E1 LEFT JOIN EMP E2 ON E2.EMPNO = E1.MGR LEFT JOIN DEPT D ON E1.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO LEFT JOIN SALGRADE S ON E1.SAL BETWEEN S.LOSAL AND S.HISAL LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offSet}

SELECT E1.EMPNO, E1.ENAME, E1.JOB, E2.ENAME AS MGR_NAME, D.DNAME, S.GRADE FROM EMP E1 LEFT JOIN EMP E2 ON E2.EMPNO = E1.MGR LEFT JOIN DEPT D ON E1.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO LEFT JOIN SALGRADE S ON E1.SAL BETWEEN S.LOSAL AND S.HISAL WHERE E1.EMPNO = #{empNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EMP E1 LEFT JOIN EMP E2 ON E2.EMPNO = E1.MGR LEFT JOIN DEPT D ON E1.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO LEFT JOIN SALGRADE S ON E1.SAL BETWEEN S.LOSAL AND S.HISAL
